Submission.title: Form Submission
Submission.description: A contact form submission from the website.

name.description: The full name of the author.

email.description: The email address of the author.

phone.description: The phone number of the author.

stage.description: The current stage of the book.

message.description: The message or description of the book.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the form was submitted.

/submissions/{submissionId}.description: Collection of all contact form submissions.
